notes: Florida state privacy and biometric laws. Note that the state portal is served at both florida.gov and myflorida.gov; florida.gov is used here as the canonical SecID namespace.

data.description: Florida statutes governing biometric identifier collection and use (Florida Information Protection Act and related amendments).

Florida's consumer privacy law, narrower in scope than most other state comprehensive laws — applies only to entities with over $1 billion in global gross revenue meeting additional criteria (e.g. operating a digital app store, or deriving revenue from smart-speaker/voice-recognition or advertising with search-engine features).
